prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document specifically relates to the workings and pay structures of the hospital and community health sector in England, as indicated by references to NHS and the electronic staff record (ESR) systems used in England. It provides estimates and details that are relevant only to the health workforce operating under NHS standards in England.
